# Vitrine

> Vitrine is a collection management platform for museums, galleries, and hobbyist collectors.
> Catalog, organise, track value, and showcase your collections of coins, stamps, trading cards,
> vinyl records, comic books, LEGO, watches, wine, art, books, and more. Free to start.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://vitrinecms.com): Product overview, features, and pricing
- [About](https://vitrinecms.com/about): Company mission and what Vitrine is
- [FAQ](https://vitrinecms.com/faq): Common questions about Vitrine answered
- [Discover](https://vitrinecms.com/discover): Browse public collections on Vitrine

## Guides

- [Essentials Guide](https://vitrinecms.com/guide/essentials): Getting started with Community and Hobbyist plans
- [Professional Guide](https://vitrinecms.com/guide/professional): Advanced features — analytics, ticketing, staff management

## Pricing

Vitrine offers four tiers:

- **Community** – Free. Basic cataloguing for small collections.
- **Hobbyist** – £5/month. Unlimited items, public website, full cataloguing.
- **Professional** – £79/month. Analytics, ticketing, compliance tools, staff roles.
- **Institution** – £349/month. Full museum-grade CMS with advanced customisation.
- **Enterprise** – Custom pricing for large organisations.

## Collection Types Supported

Vitrine supports any type of physical or digital collection, including:
coins, stamps, trading cards, sports cards, vinyl records, comic books,
LEGO sets, toys, books, wine, watches, art, photography, and more.
